title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kharagpur - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kharagpur - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur:
IIT Kharagpur is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur!
